ksa_text: Ability to identify, assess, and prioritize risks in AI systems and governance contexts; develop mitigation strategies calibrated to organizational risk tolerance and operational constraints.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

top_anchors.element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the ability contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('organizational risk tolerance'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level. STRM composite score is strong (0.4312, top tier for this dataset); semantic alignment with data frameworks may be present, but the described responsibilities involve setting or leading organizational programs rather than executing technical data work. Data Engineers implement within structures they do not establish.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
